summary.intent: Review and address PR comments on GitHub PR #479 in the moltis repo, fixing and resolving review conversations.
summary.outcome: Replaced a setup script with a GPG key + apt source approach for Docker CLI installation in the Dockerfile, added a tip about mounting /home/moltis/.npm as a named volume, committed and pushed the changes.

repo: The moltis repo uses worktrees located at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/
Docker CLI installation in the Dockerfile should follow the GPG key + apt source pattern, mirroring the existing install convention in the project.

code.finding: Docker CLI install was changed from a setup script to GPG key + apt source approach. Also added a named volume tip for /home/moltis/.npm to avoid re-downloading npx packages on every container start.

workflow: PR review comments were fetched via GitHub API using gh CLI to identify unresolved threads before making fixes.
After addressing each review comment, the conversation was resolved programmatically.
